titles.title: I'll Never Get Over the Blood That I'm Under

verse.name: v1
verse.lines: One day is victory, the next day I'm living with pain One minute the sun is shining down, then it starts to rain, But I know a touch from God will quiet the thunder I'll Never Get Over The Blood That I'm Under.

verse.name: v2
verse.lines: I'll Never Get Over The Blood That I'm Under I'll never wonder where I'll spend eternity I realize what could have been that changed at Calvary I'll Never Get Over The Blood That I'm Under.

verse.name: v3
verse.lines: I'm safe and secure with him in my heart and no one can take that from me I'm living life knowing that Heaven is where I will be When he saved my soul, no longer in sin did I wander I'll Never Get Over The Blood That I'm Under.

verse.name: v4
verse.lines: I realize what could have been that changed at Calvary, I'll Never Get Over The Blood That I'm Under, The Blood That I'm Under, The Blood That I'm Under.
